field.name: help
field.p: Categories carry the policy an asset inherits — for instance Electronics with a mandatory 24-month warranty.

field.name: help
field.p: Departments drive who sees what: a Department Head sees every allocation of the department they run.

button.name: action_mark_lost
button.confirm: Mark this asset as lost? It will be taken out of circulation.

button.name: action_dispose
button.confirm: Dispose of this asset? It will be archived.

field.name: bookable
field.help: Shared resources are booked on the calendar rather than allocated.

field.name: help
field.p: Every asset gets a unique tag (AF-0001) and a lifecycle you can follow from registration to disposal.

field.name: help
field.p: Your asset fleet at a glance
Assets grouped by lifecycle state. Switch to the graph or pivot view for value and category breakdowns.

sheet.div:
This is a transfer request. On approval,
will hand the asset over to , and their allocation () will be closed automatically.

field.name: transfer_reason
field.placeholder: Why does the asset need to change hands?

field.name: help
field.p: An asset can only have one active holder. If it is already taken, AssetFlow offers you a Transfer Request instead.

field.name: help
field.p: Meeting rooms, vehicles, lab gear… Two bookings of the same resource can never overlap.

button.name: action_approve
button.confirm: Approving takes the asset off the floor and puts it under maintenance. Continue?

button.name: action_resolve
button.confirm: Resolving puts the asset back into circulation. Continue?

field.name: description
field.placeholder: What is wrong with the asset?

field.name: resolution_notes
field.placeholder: What was done to fix it?

field.name: help
field.p: Approving a request automatically moves the asset to Under Maintenance; resolving it puts the asset back into circulation.

button.name: action_close
button.confirm: Closing applies the findings to the assets: missing assets are flagged as lost and damaged ones get a maintenance request. Continue?

sheet.div: Discrepancies found: missing and damaged asset(s). Closing the cycle will flag missing assets as Lost.

field.name: help
field.p: Pick a scope, assign auditors, and let them check off every asset. Closing the cycle writes the findings back onto the assets.

field.name: help
field.p: Assets from the audit cycles you are assigned to will show up here.
